retry_reason: Failure occurs when the object's refcount is zero (dying/being freed); retrying is pointless as the object is gone.
contract_summary: RCU-protected get-wrapper: searches for a calipso_doi by DOI and, if found and still alive (refcount non-zero), increments its reference count. Returns a pointer to the object with an additional reference, or NULL if not found or dying. The caller must release the reference via calipso_doi_put() (or equivalent) when done. The RCU read lock is only held transiently during the lookup and reference acquisition; the caller need not hold it afterward.
